seoTitle: Mount Lonarch vs Mount Major — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Lonarch and Mount Major. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Lonarch vs Mount Major: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Lonarch and Mount Major.
heading: Mount Lonarch vs Mount Major — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Lonarch, Victoria and Mount Major, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Lonarch has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Mount Major (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Lonarch or Mount Major safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Lonarch has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Mount Major scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Lonarch scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Major scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Lonarch or Mount Major?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Lonarch has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.83% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
